description: You are an astronomer analyzing star formation in the Whirlpool Galaxy (M51). Your task is to isolate and count young star clusters (HII regions) from the image at '~/Fiji_Data/raw/astronomy/m51.tif' by suppressing the diffuse galactic glow. Apply a Bandpass Filter (filtering large structures of 40 pixels and small structures of 3 pixels with autoscaling) and save the filtered image to '~/Fiji_Data/results/astronomy/m51_filtered.tif'. Segment the clusters using an automatic threshold and analyze particles within a size range of 5-500 pixels^2. Record the Area and Mean Gray Value for each cluster. Save the final measurements table to '~/Fiji_Data/results/astronomy/cluster_measurements.csv' and the analysis mask to '~/Fiji_Data/results/astronomy/cluster_mask.png'.
